title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Those with Hormonal Imbalances Suffering from Oily Hair
description: Salvia officinalis essential oils have been found to be beneficial for managing oily hair due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The main constituents of this oil include camphor, bornyl acetate, and thujone, which help to regulate the scalp's natural oil production and reduce inflammation. When used in hair care, Salvia officinalis essential oils can help to balance the scalp's pH level, thereby reducing oiliness and promoting a healthy scalp environment...
